# GLAD OpenGL loader

Generated with GLAD 2.0.8 (commit `73db193f853e2ee079bf3ca8a64aa2eaf6459043`) for `gl:core=4.1`, with no extensions:

```sh
python -m glad --api gl:core=4.1 --extensions '' --reproducible c --out-path <output>
```

The generated source is checked in deliberately so normal Horo Engine builds do not require Python, Jinja2, network access, or configure-time code generation. See `LICENSE` for GLAD and Khronos licensing terms.
